name: Vacuum Cleaner Motor Controller
requirement: 需要设计吸尘器电机控制器
summary: A cascaded controller for a vacuum cleaner motor, focusing on speed regulation to maintain suction performance under varying load conditions.
design_rules: Inferred from requirement: Vacuum cleaner motor requires stable speed under variable suction load.
Cascaded control chosen: Outer speed loop for performance, inner current loop for torque regulation.
Assumed motor type: 3-phase PMSM/BLDC, controlled via field-oriented control (FOC) in dq-frame.
No position loop needed as vacuum motors typically run at constant or user-set speed.
Voltage modulation and power stage are excluded per constraint 5.

output_format.blocks: Each block has id, type, function, parameters.
output_format.edges: Each edge has id, from, to, signal.
output_format.layout: Explicit hierarchy showing loop levels and cascade order.
output_format.signals: All signals are continuous-time controller references or feedbacks.
